gap_analysis.description: Identify research gaps, unanswered questions, or underexplored areas in a topic

hypothesis_generation.description: Generate testable research hypotheses or conjectures based on gaps

experiment.description: Design, run, or track experiments to validate hypotheses

insight.description: Extract key insights, patterns, or synthesis from research papers

narrative.description: Track research narrative threads, phases, or story arcs across the research

paper_search.description: Search for papers or research publications by keywords or topic

question_answer.description: Ask a research question that can be answered from the paper library

general.description: General research conversation or open-ended discussion
